title: Blisschen's ASMR Anvils - Remove Those Anvil Sounds!
description: Replaces the "rename" anvil sound with a 0:01 clip of silence. Intended for running alongside CIT resource packs.
body:
picture this: you've had a long day and you're ready to start building with some CIT minecraft, relaxing lo-fi music, and a nice cup of herbal tea steaming happily beside you. you go to place an anvil and then **CLAAAAAAANG.** it goes right to your skull instantly. a headache starts forming between your eyebrow. This pack fixes that.

-------------------------------- Blisschen's ASMR Anvils: No Sounds, No Headaches, No Worries. Guaranteed.*™ -------------------------------- *my lawyer says i technically can't promise any health benefits, because the fda will come after me.

**notes:** ∙ literally just replaces every "rename success" anvil sound i had to listen to with a 0:01 clip of silence. ∙ this pack is intended for CIT pack users between 1.13 to latest version of the game, unless if mojang chooses to remove anvils at some point-- in which we have _much_ bigger problems than this pack. ∙ works flawlessly with ~~every version~~ my client that i've done the bare minimum testing on to verify this works up to the latest version of the game. ∙ should be placed above all other resource packs, just in case anyone got fancy with their much better designed packs. technically it can go anywhere, but if you start hearing that anvil again, might be time to move it up a bit. ∙ silence.ogg is [copyright-free CC0 1.0 from wikimedia.org](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Silence.ogg) ∙ this is a copy of [my resource pack on PM](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/blisschen-s-asmr-anvils-remove-those-anvil-sounds/) because i had to redownload it once on a different device and found it annoying to have to go to a different site to do so.

**[linktr.ee/blisschen](https://linktr.ee/blisschen)**
